# Canonicalize golden fixtures. Format: "<input>\t<expected canonical>".
# Lines starting with # are comments; empty lines are ignored.
https://github.com/foo/bar	https://github.com/foo/bar.git
https://github.com/foo/bar.git	https://github.com/foo/bar.git
https://GITHUB.com/Foo/Bar	https://github.com/Foo/Bar.git
https://github.com/foo/bar/	https://github.com/foo/bar.git
https://github.com/foo//bar	https://github.com/foo/bar.git
https://github.com:443/foo/bar.git	https://github.com/foo/bar.git
http://example.com:80/foo/bar.git	http://example.com/foo/bar.git
https://user:token@github.com/foo/bar.git	https://github.com/foo/bar.git
https://TOKEN@github.com/foo/bar.git	https://github.com/foo/bar.git
ssh://git@github.com/foo/bar.git	ssh://git@github.com/foo/bar.git
ssh://git@github.com:22/foo/bar.git	ssh://git@github.com/foo/bar.git
git@github.com:foo/bar.git	ssh://git@github.com/foo/bar.git
git@github.com:foo/bar	ssh://git@github.com/foo/bar.git
deploy-bot@git.example.internal:org/repo.git	ssh://deploy-bot@git.example.internal/org/repo.git
ssh://git@github.com/foo/bar.git?ref=main#frag	ssh://git@github.com/foo/bar.git
git://github.com:9418/foo/bar.git	git://github.com/foo/bar.git
https://[::1]/foo/bar	https://[::1]/foo/bar.git
https://[::1]:443/foo/bar	https://[::1]/foo/bar.git
https://[::1]:8080/foo/bar	https://[::1]:8080/foo/bar.git
ssh://git@[fe80::1]/foo/bar	ssh://git@[fe80::1]/foo/bar.git
ssh://git@[fe80::1]:22/foo/bar	ssh://git@[fe80::1]/foo/bar.git
